title: Feature/batch norm
body:
Added a boolean use_batch_norm flag to the CNN and MLP feature extractors.
- In NatureCNN, each convolutional block can insert an nn.BatchNorm2d layer (before the ReLU) when use_batch_norm=True.
- In create_mlp, an initial nn.BatchNorm1d may be applied to the inputs, and batch-norm modules can wrap each linear layer.
All defaults remain unchanged (batch norm off), and existing behavior is preserved.

Motivation:
Batch normalization can improve training stability and convergence speed. Enabling use_batch_norm provides this benefit without breaking existing workflows.

step_plan.summary: Add an optional use_batch_norm flag to both CNN and MLP feature extractors. When enabled, NationCNN inserts BatchNorm2d layers before ReLU in CNN blocks and create_mlp can wrap inputs and each Linear with BatchNorm1d. Default behavior remains unchanged (batch norm off).

steps.operation: Add use_batch_norm parameter to NatureCNN.__init__ and integrate BatchNorm2d insertion before ReLU in each CNN block when enabled
steps.reason: Introduce an optional use_batch_norm flag to control batch normalization within CNN blocks, inserting BatchNorm2d layers before ReLU activations when enabled; defaults remain off to preserve existing behavior
steps.side_effects: Adds a new parameter to the constructor; potential changes to initialization and forward paths; requires tests to verify BN placement and that default behavior (use_batch_norm=False) remains identical to current implementation; may require updates to docs and changelog; downstream modules constructing NatureCNN may need to pass the new flag

steps.operation: Extend create_mlp to accept use_batch_norm and implement optional BatchNorm1d wrapping of inputs and after each Linear layer
steps.reason: Provide optional BatchNorm1d support for MLP feature extractor: optionally apply BatchNorm1d to inputs and wrap each Linear layer with BatchNorm1d, while preserving current behavior when use_batch_norm is False
steps.side_effects: Adds BN modules to MLP path, increasing parameter count and changing training dynamics when enabled; tests must verify BN-enabled paths; default behavior unchanged; may affect loading/save compatibility if state_dict expectations shift; documentation and changelog updates required
